case_title: PAUL DIMITRI YUGOFF VS. THE MUNICIPAL RAILWAY OF THE CCSF

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YUGOFF, PAUL DIMITRI AS TRUSTEE OF THE YUGOFF FAMILY LIVING TRUST AS TO DEFENDANT THE MUNICIPAL RAILWAY  OF THE CCSF NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          NOV-15-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-16-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       OCT-17-2002

MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-15-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
AFTER HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. (212) PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: JOYCE LONG, CSR#8620 (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-30-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE NOV-15-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-30-2002 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-30-2002 CONTINUED TO MAR-17-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-17-2003 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST PAUL DIMITRI YUGOFF, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAR-17-2003, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-25-2003. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: RON SINCLAIR. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-17-2003 CONTINUED TO MAY-12-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-12-2003 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAY-12-2003 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: JOYCE D. LONG, CSR #8620. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-12-2003 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No apperance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substancial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, It is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed without prejudice. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Joyce D. Long, CSR #8620. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-18-2003 Continued To May-12-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 5/19/2003 at 1:30 PM, in department 212. Proceedings reported by: Ron Sinclair. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-31-2002 Continued To Mar-17-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff appearing in Propria Persona. The OSC is re-set to 3/17/2003 at 1:30 PM, in department 212. Proceedings reported by: Carl Sauceda. Matter heard by Hon. Sue Kaplan. (212)
